channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iraqi national accused of plotting terror attacks in the U.S., officials say
item.description: Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi faces federal charges for allegedly planning multiple attacks, including targeting a Jewish...

item.title: Iran says it cannot trust the U.S. in talks as Trump claims we control the strait
item.description: Speaking to reporters on Air Force One, President Trump also asserted that he had eliminated Iran's armed forces.

item.title: Democrats test a new red state strategy: Back independents over their own nominees
Iran live updates: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended for 45 days
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with large joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
